Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Health and nutrition' and 'Sickness and health' as conversation topics, including a doctor visit role-play, directly contributing to awareness and discussion around personal well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), develops advanced language and communication skills for daily and scientific use (Target 4.4), and explicitly fosters the appreciation of diverse cultures (Target 4.7).
